diagrams.title: Cycle Notation Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how cycle (1 2 3) maps elements in a circular manner
diagrams.purpose: Understand how permutations rearrange elements using cycle notation

diagrams.title: Multiplicative Group Z7* as Circular Diagram
diagrams.description: Generator 3 moving through all 6 elements of Z7* showing cyclic nature
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why Zp* is cyclic and how generators traverse all elements

diagrams.title: Parity of Permutations
diagrams.description: Even vs odd permutations shown using transposition count
diagrams.purpose: Understand permutation parity and alternating group construction

diagrams.title: Subgroup Lattice of S3
diagrams.description: Shows subgroup structure of S3 including A3 and cyclic subgroups
diagrams.purpose: Understand subgroup relationships and Cayley's theorem visualization
